title: load_idxcolumn: Assertion `kc->c' failed
key_bug_features: Dropping foreign key and indexed column in sequence
bug_features_seed:
CREATE TABLE "tst"."t4" (
         "id"      int NOT NULL,
         "t3_id"   int,
         "value"   float,
         CONSTRAINT "t4_id_pkey" PRIMARY KEY ("id"),
         CONSTRAINT "t4_t3_id_fkey" FOREIGN KEY ("t3_id") REFERENCES "tst"."t3" ("id")
 );
